text.message: This game can’t be real lmao
One guy is about to get the entire middle of the board and another has a city
Ok next two are reserved for you
Gotta report you throwing at this point
Green wins with settle and roads
Imagine such bad player they rob from people who aren’t winning
and you win with 2 cities lol, while were making wish lists
I think 2 cities is harder lol
road is hard dude, its literally impossible
Yea with the settle I mean
there is absolutely 0 chance i get a settle and 2 roads AND you guys dont extend by 1
You have good production who knows what rolls/happens
nice scam though, guess it worked
U still have so many ways to win lol
yes, a settle and 2 cities lmao
which as you said, is pretty freaking hard
i can trade you brick blue
better than winning with two roads methinks
Last turn I was considering moving off the 9 but you had 8 cards
got more roads for ya blue
think you need to connect now that black has 13
Now road is impossible for me
my city way hard than your settle with an extra dev
I have to settle and city again
we know you have a non knight
